description_long: This is a stylized male jogger dressed in a dark gray hoodie with a red diagonal stripe and matching red drawstrings, paired with black and gray athletic shorts and leggings. The jogger's face is partially obscured by a hood and a black face mask with green and red accents, giving a modern, urban look. He wears fingerless gloves and carries a small red pouch or accessory attached to his right hip. His footwear consists of bright red sneakers with white soles and laces, adding a bold contrast to the otherwise muted outfit. The figure's build is athletic, with defined limbs and a slightly relaxed, upright stance. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary, streetwise runner prepared for urban environments.
description: A modern male jogger in a dark hoodie, black and gray shorts with leggings, red sneakers, and a face mask, exuding an urban athletic style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the jogger's hooded face, red-accented hoodie, gloves, and red sneakers clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, the red stripe on the sleeve, and the pouch on the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, the full length of the hoodie, and the pouch hanging from the right hip.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm, leg, and sneaker details, with the pouch partially visible.
attribute_clothing_type: Fitted dark gray hoodie with red diagonal stripe and drawstrings, black and gray athletic shorts over black leggings, and fingerless gloves, all appearing to be made from synthetic athletic fabrics.
attribute_footwear_type: Red running shoes with white soles and laces, featuring a thick, cushioned sole and a low-top design.
attribute_running_posture: Standing upright with arms relaxed at the sides, legs straight and close together, and no dynamic running motion depicted.
attribute_headwear: Black hood, part of the hoodie, covering the head and partially shadowing the face.
